summary.summary: Adds an acknowledgeOnDevice(identifier:) helper and calls it from requestSnooze so that dismissing an in-app banner / swiping away a user notification also forwards an acknowledgement to the issuing device manager (AlertResponder) by invoking acknowledgeAlert. The change is implemented in Trio/Sources/Services/Alerts/TrioAlertManager.swift (see diff and commit) and replaces the previous path that only snoozed without forwarding an ack. (See pr:gordolio/Trio#1285; file:8be3f6914cc4; diff:b720ea92af84; commit:e66bc689e004.)
summary.userFacingImpact: Behavior for users: the dismiss/snooze UX is unchanged (swipe/tap still auto-snoozes and dismisses presentations), but pump-issued alerts are now also acknowledged at the pump manager/device level so device-side alerts (e.g., pod beeps on repeat reminders) are cleared when the user dismisses the in-app/banner notification. The PR notes Trio-internal alerts (certain CGM/glucose alerts) are unaffected and pump managers that implement no-op ack behavior (Medtrum, Dana, Minimed) see no change. (See pr:nightscout/Trio#1285; pr:gordolio/Trio#1285; commit:e66bc689e004.)
